chief_complaint: Progressive right hind limping after repeated fetch sessions.
medical_history: Overweight middle-aged retriever with weekend sprinting and jumping.
clinical_summary: Stifle pain and joint effusion raised concern for partial to complete cranial cruciate ligament rupture.

chief_complaint: Exercise intolerance and slowing on neighborhood walks.

medical_history: Indoor Labrador with recent weight gain and fewer daily walks.
clinical_summary: Body condition excess was worsening joint strain and reducing exercise tolerance.

chief_complaint: Head shaking with foul ear odor for one week.

chief_complaint: Bunny hopping gait and pain after long runs.

chief_complaint: Gradual hind end weakness and nail dragging.

chief_complaint: Left hind limping after running at the park.

chief_complaint: Chewing feet and recurrent hot spots every spring.

chief_complaint: Labored breathing and loud snoring that worsened overnight.

chief_complaint: Face fold redness and itchy paws.

chief_complaint: Vomiting weakness and slow recovery after a stressful boarding stay.

chief_complaint: Chronic ear discharge and repeated scratching at one ear.

chief_complaint: Restless pacing with a distended abdomen and nonproductive retching.

chief_complaint: Strong ear odor and constant head shaking.

chief_complaint: Brief generalized seizure with normal recovery afterward.

chief_complaint: Weight gain and slower stair climbing.

chief_complaint: Progressive forelimb pain with localized swelling near the wrist.

chief_complaint: Difficulty standing after rest and reduced willingness to run.

chief_complaint: Nonproductive retching and sudden abdominal enlargement after exercise.

chief_complaint: Chronic bunny hopping and stiffness after runs.
